subject: Review AIER Code Roadmap V2 discussion pack
body: Lane_03 requests Lane_02 review of the AIER Code Roadmap V2 discussion pack. This is a review request only and does not authorize implementation.
requested_action: Review the discussion pack and answer the Lane_02 questions about UZG+ lane boundaries, backend/interface expectations, and what AIER must not control yet.
acceptance_criteria: Lane_02 response addresses the Lane_02 review questions in the discussion pack.
Lane_02 response protects UZG+ product lane boundaries.
Lane_02 response does not begin implementation.
